plugins.name: tribo-marketing
plugins.description: A complete marketing skill suite: 84 specialist skills covering copywriting, email, sales funnels, paid and organic social, SEO/SEM, advertising, brand strategy, lead generation, analytics, automation, and more. Each skill turns Claude into a domain expert for a specific marketing task.
